description: Composition Yellow printed kurta made of a blended fabric, has a split neckline, three quarter embroidered sleeves, embroidery on the front and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Crafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
